identity.mission: Create a flooring store SaaS that feels like a modern architectural studio—grounded, tactile, and precise.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Architectural Precision' with 'Warm Materiality'.
Emotion First: The app should feel 'sturdy' and 'reliable', like good oak flooring.
Content is King: Data clarity is paramount for inventory, but it shouldn't look like a spreadsheet.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to reduce cognitive load for busy store owners.

heading.usage: All headings (h1-h6), prominent labels, stat values.

body.usage: Body text, table data, inputs, buttons.

rules: Headings: Use `tracking-tight` for all headings larger than 24px.
Labels: Uppercase labels must use `tracking-widest` and `text-xs`.
Numbers: Use tabular nums (`tabular-nums`) for all price and inventory data.

accent.description: Terracotta/Clay for primary CTAs and highlights.

logic: Main Chart: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-8 row-span-2

containers.card: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

input.base: rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tracing_beam.usage: Use for high-priority cards or active states.
tracing_beam.style: Border gradient that animates or a subtle glow effect.

textures.sidebar: Use a subtle noise texture (opacity 0.02) on the sidebar background to give it a 'paper' feel.

login_background.description: Minimalist white room with open doorway, conveying potential and space.

dashboard_hero.description: Modern interior with large windows, suitable for dashboard widgets or welcome banner.

texture_wood.description: Wood benches on marble floor, good for texture reference or specific product cards.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic gradients or default Tailwind blue.
Data-Test-ID: All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-button'`).
Contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards. Use darker grays for text on light backgrounds.
Input Fields: Never use the native date picker. Use the Shadcn Calendar component.
Empty States: Never leave a list empty without a helpful message and a call to action.
Loading States: Use skeletons that match the layout of the loading content, not generic spinners.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts (Manrope, DM Sans) in `index.css` via @import or link in `index.html`.
Update `tailwind.config.js` with the custom color palette and font families.
Implement the 'Layout Wrapper' component that handles the sidebar and header structure.
Build the Dashboard using the Bento Grid principles defined above.
Ensure the 'Leads' and 'Inventory' tables use the 'Soft Utility' styling (compact but rounded).
